message:
feat(pager,wal): RwLock WAL backend + concurrent page reads

Three-layer change to enable concurrent WAL page reads:

1. WalBackend trait: read_page/committed_txns_since_page → &self
   WalFile: read_frame/read_frame_into/read_frame_header → &self
   (safe because VFS read uses pread which is thread-safe)

2. SharedWalBackend: Mutex → RwLock
   - write() for append_frames, sync, checkpoint
   - read() for concurrent page reads
   - with_wal_backend_read() for concurrent read path

3. get_page() WAL fast path: before inner.lock(), try WAL read
   via RwLock::read() — concurrent with all other readers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
